about.title: About
about.intro: Designer, artist, experimenter and programmer in my spare time – Always looking for the next project.
about.paragraph1: I deeply ponder the integration between people, systems and companies. Currently studying how to align my programming knowledge to better document processes and design systems.
about.paragraph2: Available for freelancing opportunities and remote work. If you have an idea you want to turn into reality, {{link}}!
about.currentlyTitle: Besides design and programming, I'm currently:
currentInterests: Reading Memoirs of a Militia Sergeant

contact.introText1: Every good idea starts with a good story. If you have a project or just want to say
contact.introText3: Get in touch via email, LinkedIn or the form below. Give as many details as your imagination allows – let's talk!
contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Let's talk! I'm always open to discuss new projects and ideas.
